data.title: In 2026, the crypto sector is projected to boost US economy by $55B, creating 232,000 jobs nationwide: NCA study.
data.description: A recently published study indicates that by 2026, cryptocurrency companies are projected to create or support approximately 232,000 jobs throughout the United States economy.

data.title: Taco Celebrates First Graduating Cohort of Manager Development Program, Reinforcing Commitment to Leadership Growth
data.description: In Cranston, Rhode Island, on July 23, 2026, Taco reported the successful completion of the inaugural Manager Development Program (MDP). This two-year program aims to cultivate a cadre of competent leaders worldwide within the company. The MDP is designed to provide internal leaders with essential strategies for effective leadership.

data.title: LEADING PODCAST NETWORK THE ROOST RELAUNCHES AS PODIUM, SIGNS TRISHA PAYTAS' JUST TRISH AS FIRST MAJOR PARTNERSHIP
data.description: Los Angeles-headquartered Night management and media firm revealed on July 23, 2026, the rebranding of The Roost to Podium. This move represents a shift towards a video-centric, multi-platform podcast organization tailored for the upcoming wave of content creators. Night has played a key role in cultivating online talent with vast influence, setting the stage for Podium's emergence in the industry.

data.title: Early Detection Matters: AAOS calls attention to rare sarcomas amid growing national focus
data.description: Emphasizing the importance of timely diagnosis and specialized care, the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons (AAOS) in Roemont, Illinois, has underscored the significance of awareness and federal action during Sarcoma Awareness Month on July 23, 2026. They stress the necessity for patients to pay attention to persistent pain and swelling symptoms, with the aim of providing access to specialized care promptly. This call for action aims to address the critical need for early diagnosis and treatment of sarcoma, highlighting the crucial role of awareness in this process.

data.title: PPL Corporation signs Ratepayer Protection Pledge and highlights existing customer protections in Pennsylvania and Kentucky
data.description: On July 23, 2026, PPL Corporation of Allentown, Pennsylvania, revealed their endorsement of the White House's Ratepayer Protection Pledge. This emphasizes their dedication to maintaining affordable, reliable, and sustainable practices. The pledge has garnered support from various entities, underscoring its significance in promoting consumer well-being and steady development within the industry.

data.title: ITOB: INSIDE THE OWNER'S BOX LAUNCHES AT THE INTERSECTION OF SPORTS AND CAPITAL
data.description: Industry experts Justin Nuñez and Mike Valdes-Fauli are collaborating to co-host a new media platform that delves into the world of sports and finance. Named Inside the Owner's Box (ITOB), the platform explores the latest deals, investments, and cultural influences propelling the sports industry forward. The initiative, officially launched in Miami on July 23, 2026, aims to provide insights at the intersection of sports and capital.

data.title: GOAT USA AND MAJOR LEAGUE BASEBALL UNVEIL NEW YORK METS COLLECTION
data.description: A popular Long Island-based lifestyle brand is honoring three generations of Mets fans through a special collection. The brand, GOAT USA, known for its emphasis on confidence and community, revealed the release of an exclusive hometown line. The collection pays tribute to the New York Mets and their dedicated fanbase. This announcement was made on July 23, 2026.

data.title: ImageTrend supports State of Iowa with addition of Community Health Module to EMS and Trauma Registry
data.description: In EAGAN, Minnesota on July 23, 2026, ImageTrend has revealed the successful amendment of the EMS data system contract by the State of Iowa. This amendment includes the integration of ImageTrend's Community Health module into the statewide EMS Registry. The funding for this enhancement is entirely covered by the Centers for...

data.title: Paradigm Oral Health Announces Surgeon-Led Buyback, Backed by Warburg Pincus-Led Investor Group
data.description: On July 23, 2026, Paradigm Oral Health, a prominent oral surgery and digital dentistry platform, revealed a significant update. The Company disclosed its decision to repurchase BlackRock Long Term Private Capital's ownership slice, regaining majority control of the organization.

data.title: MulticoreWare and AMD Collaborate to Advance Physical AI and Autonomous Robotics on AMD Platforms
data.description: MulticoreWare, Inc., a global tech firm specializing in AI software solutions, showcased real-time multimodal AI and vision-language-action workflows on AMD Ryzen™ AI platforms at the AMD Advancing AI 2026 event in San Jose, California on July 23, 2026. This demonstration highlighted the capabilities of their AI technology on AMD Ryzen™ AI platforms and emphasized the integration of different modes of data processing. The event attracted a significant audience, with the demonstration impressing attendees with its advanced functionalities and seamless execution.

data.title: US to retract subpoenas issued to NY Times journalists following a Federal judge's criticism, amid claims of press intimidation.
data.description: A federal judge expressed concerns regarding the government's management of the subpoenas, which, according to The Times, were perceived as a move to intimidate the freedom of the press.

data.title: Mattel and Lucha Libre AAA® Announce Worldwide Licensing Partnership
data.description: Mattel, Inc., a renowned global play and family entertainment company, along with WWE, unveiled a fresh multi-year global licensing agreement at a shared San Diego Comic-Con panel. This agreement broadens Mattel's WWE repertoire to encompass Lucha Libre AAA Worldwide (AAA), a highly esteemed lucha libre promotion in Mexico. The newly sealed deal solidifies Mattel as the primary provider of WWE action figures and toys for fans globally. This expanded partnership is set to commence in the fall of 2027.

data.title: Kirin與Blackmores攜手合作，在澳洲和紐西蘭推出含Kirin Group的Cognizin®胞二磷膽鹼的腦功能輔助補充品
data.description: Tokyo - Kirin Holdings Company, Limited (Kirin Holdings) (TOKYO:2503) and Blackmores Limited, a leading natural health company in Australia under the Kirin Group, are pleased to announce the launch of Blackmores Cognition Ultra in Australia and Blackmores Ultra Brain Care in New Zealand. These new supplements feature the scientifically validated ingredient Cognizin® Citicoline provided by Kirin Group's subsidiary Kyowa Hakko Bio Co., Ltd., marking Blackmores' first product aimed at enhancing cognitive performance. Manufactured at Blackmores' production facility in Braeside, the product will be available in New Zealand pharmacies and on Blackmores' Australian e-commerce platform starting in late July, followed by a launch in Australian pharmacies in September. Since Blackmores joined Kirin Group in August 2023, the Group has strengthened measures to meet consumer health needs in the Asia Pacific region and explore value creation opportunities and business synergies in the health science sector.

data.title: BitMEX exit underscores crypto consolidation with rising regulatory costs, market concentration, and licensed trading venues.
data.description: The closure of BitMEX represents the conclusion of one of the pioneering derivative exchanges in the cryptocurrency industry. Analysts attribute this development to increasing regulatory expenses, market consolidation, and the transition towards regulated trading platforms. This event signifies a significant shift in the sector, with BitMEX's shutdown impacting numerous traders and the broader cryptocurrency community.
